name: Curried Chicken Liver Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt half of the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic, stirring until softened, then add chicken livers.
3. Cook gently for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Stir in curry powder and cook for an additional minute.
5. Add chicken stock and cook gently for another 5 minutes, ensuring the livers are cooked through by frequently stirring them.
6. Transfer the mixture to a blender or food processor and blend until smooth.
7. Season with salt, pepper, and cayenne pepper to taste.
8. Pour the pate into a serving dish or terrine mold, smoothing the surface.
9. Melt the remaining butter in a saucepan and drizzle over the top of the pate.
10. Allow the pate to set slightly before garnishing with bay leaves and lemon slices, if desired.
11. Chill the pate for several hours or overnight before serving with bread.
Variation: Add additional curry powder to taste when melting the butter topping.
